known_evidence: Public Dryad package declares anthocyanin, tannin, flower size, nectar, floral visitor, florivory, fruit, seed, and processed-data files.
main_uncertainty: Whether floral A and B are independent variables and whether shared plant/treatment IDs link each target outcome.
required_source: Dryad table headers plus article methods
next_action: Recover table structure; register only effects with direct estimate/SE or computable raw table and declared denominator.

known_evidence: Open article and Mendeley public data package; nectar, visitation/pollination, florivory and reproductive outcomes reported.
main_uncertainty: The experiments manipulate visitor access and corolla damage, not an independently measured A or B trait; latex/ants are mechanism explanations rather than plant-level B variables.
required_source: Article methods and Mendeley public package
next_action: Retain in direct-case/M2 ledger; re-screen only if the public raw package contains a predeclared trait-level model with recoverable uncertainty.

known_evidence: Public Dryad package documents blossom-level trait, pollen, resin-removal, seed-predation, patch and blossom identifiers.
main_uncertainty: Bract and resin traits may be advertisement/reward/pollen-transfer traits rather than independent B traits.
required_source: Dryad table headers plus article trait-function methods
next_action: Classify each trait function before effect extraction; retain only A effects until an independent B mechanism is demonstrated.

known_evidence: Full text reports exsertion/lip traits with stigmatic pollen and pre-dispersal seed predation.
main_uncertainty: Exsertion conflates flower length and bract height; public supplement is aggregate rather than recoverable individual table.
next_action: Retain as M2 mechanism evidence; do not enter quantitative registry unless a recoverable individual or declared aggregate effect/SE is confirmed.

target_effect_roles: Full text measures floral production, size, volatiles and pollen chemistry with florivorous beetle response.
known_evidence: No pollination response; floral terpenoids not established as a flower-specific B trait in this experiment.
queue_status: Extract only direct A-to-floral-antagonism effects with recoverable uncertainty and denominators.

target_effect_roles: Abstract reports calyx length, hummingbird pollination, larval seed predation, and path analysis.
known_evidence: No independent floral B trait evident from metadata; table availability unknown.
queue_status: Screen for effect estimates linking calyx/display to pollination and seed predation; do not infer B from seed predation itself.

target_effect_roles: Sequential reproductive components include floral traits, pollination proxy, and seed survival/predation.
known_evidence: Independent floral B trait is not evident; source likely predates routine public data archiving.
queue_status: Extract direct reported coefficients only; table recovery and denominator checks required.
